_comment: label -> model registry for the figure pipeline (scripts/run_figures.py). local_path is a RELATIVE model dir-name resolved by load_registry() under ONE cache root: $SANDHI_MODELS_DIR if set, else $HF_HOME/models (default repo-local hf_cache/models). Weights download from hf_repo into that root when *.safetensors are missing, so the pipeline is self-contained by default and needs no /scratch mounts. All repos verified against the HF API 2026-07-11.
_optional_fields: Optional per-entry knobs read by the eval runners: 'eval_limit' (int/float -> lm_eval --limit, eval_harness.registry_eval_limit) and 'apply_chat_template' (bool -> whether lm_eval prompts this model through its chat template on MC/loglikelihood tasks, eval_harness.registry_apply_chat_template). apply_chat_template is PER-MODEL because chat-tuned models can score at chance on raw MC prompts (Llama-3.1-8B-UltraMedical/medqa_4options 27.83 raw) while others handle raw fine (MedGo/medqa_4options 76.26 raw). Set it per model only after the GPU audit (chattmpl/audit_templates.py) confirms a large templated>raw delta; absent -> unchanged raw prompting. When it is toggled for a model, invalidate that model's stored baseline (micr baseline store) so baseline and candidates are prompted the same way.

Light-IF-32B._note: weights resolved from the shared HF cache snapshot (no download needed)
